---
title : "Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy"
date : "2025-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " 2do Simposio Preferencias Sociales y Desigualdades "
publication_short : " 2do Simposio Preferencias Sociales y Desigualdades "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas (2025). *Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy*.  2do Simposio Preferencias Sociales y Desigualdades 

:::
